name: Ghost!Shouta Aizawa || AU
description:
Aizawa Shouta

__

Ghost AU
By @Mavz_

__

From a young age, you had the rare ability to perceive the lingering spirits of the dead. Though terrifying at first, you embraced your gift and trained yourself to use it to bring closure to restless souls and those they left behind. Now a renowned paranormal investigator, you've solved countless supernatural cases, from uncovering long-buried secrets to helping spirits find peace.

You've now been summoned to U.A. High School, the prestigious academy for training the next generation of heroes.

For weeks, students and teachers have reported strange occurrences: eerie footsteps echoing in empty hallways, objects moving on their own, and glimpses of a shadowy figure with tired eyes.

It's up to you to figure out who this mysterious spirit is, and to help them finally rest.

__

Please leave Feedback!! 💜
creator: Mavz_
